title: Mellow Creamy Croatian Tofu Skillet
description: A garlicky, creamy Croatian tofu skillet with shichimi-togarashi, glaze, and egg-free-friendly, perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
instructions: Press the tofu to remove excess moisture and pat dry, then cut into 1 cm cubes.
Heat 1 tbsp of olive oil in a tava over medium heat and add tofu, cooking until golden on all sides, about 8 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Remove the tofu from the tava to a plate.
Add the remaining 1 tbsp of olive oil and minced garlic to the same tava, cooking for 1 minute until fragrant.
Stir in the shichimi togarashi and cook for 30 seconds.
Pour in soy sauce, coconut milk, maple syrup, and lemon juice, bringing the mixture to a simmer and allowing it to reduce for 3 minutes until slightly thickened.
Return the tofu to the tava, toss to coat with the sauce, and cook for an additional 2 minutes until heated through; season with salt and pepper.
Sprinkle chopped parsley over the skillet and serve hot.
